case_title: OWYANG, SAM VS MOUSSA, BASSEM DR.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY OWYANG, SAM AS TO DEFENDANT MOUSSA, BASSEM DR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-28-2000 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MOUSSA, BASSEM DR.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OWYANG, SAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOUSSA, BASSEM DR. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,020.00, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
